repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Decorative bars in red and blue
Fabric cover at front and back. Broken binding with several detached quires in first third; boards missing
Loose upright minuscule with pronounced ligatures
Pencil foliation in bottom outer margin; incorrect sequence for ff. 50, 51, 51a, 52
Previous catalogs dated this manuscript to the 13th-14th c. CE
